image.description: The sketch or line drawing image to use as structural guidance.

prompt.description: Text describing the desired output image including content, colors, textures, and style.

negative_prompt.description: Text describing elements to exclude from the output image.

control_strength.description: Controls how closely the output follows the input sketch. Higher values produce outputs more faithful to the sketch structure.

seed.description: A value to control randomness in generation.

output_format.description: The output format of the generated image.
